title: Minimum Deletions for Unique Frequencies
description: Given a string x, find the minimum number of character deletions required so that no two different characters have the exact same frequency.
outputFormat: Integer representing the number of deletions
hint: First, map out the frequencies of each character using a HashMap. Then, use a HashSet to keep track of frequencies you've already 'claimed'. If a frequency is taken, decrement it until it isn't.
